targets.rawSql: SELECT countIf(duration_ms <= JSONExtractFloat(payload, 'sla_max_duration_ms')) * 100.0 / count() AS compliance_pct FROM workflow_audit WHERE event_type='workflow.complete' AND created_at >= now() - INTERVAL 1 DAY AND duration_ms IS NOT NULL

SELECT toStartOfHour(created_at) AS t, countIf(duration_ms <= JSONExtractFloat(payload, 'sla_max_duration_ms')) * 100.0 / count() AS pct FROM workflow_audit WHERE event_type='workflow.complete' AND created_at >= now() - INTERVAL 7 DAY GROUP BY t ORDER BY t

SELECT workflow_id, count() AS runs, avg(duration_ms) AS avg_ms, max(duration_ms) AS max_ms, countIf(duration_ms > JSONExtractFloat(payload, 'sla_max_duration_ms')) AS breaches FROM workflow_audit WHERE event_type='workflow.complete' AND created_at >= now() - INTERVAL 1 DAY GROUP BY workflow_id ORDER BY breaches DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT workflow_id, tenant_id, duration_ms, JSONExtractFloat(payload, 'sla_max_duration_ms') AS sla_max, multiIf(duration_ms > JSONExtractFloat(payload, 'sla_hard_limit_ms'), 'HARD', duration_ms > JSONExtractFloat(payload, 'sla_max_duration_ms'), 'SOFT', 'OK') AS level FROM workflow_audit WHERE event_type='workflow.complete' AND created_at >= now() - INTERVAL 1 DAY AND duration_ms > JSONExtractFloat(payload, 'sla_max_duration_ms') ORDER BY duration_ms DESC LIMIT 100

list.name: workflow_id
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT workflow_id FROM workflow_audit WHERE event_type='workflow.complete'
